based on maggie rhee from ‘the walking dead’ around s7/8 onwards.

still working on requests! but i figured i’d share my ‘write your own’/‘choose your scenario’ bots to keep y’all fed in the meantime… and because it just occurred to me i’ve been hoarding these for myself.

want to request a bot? go to my carrd.
